chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-335 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections 2.For orders on MA 2933/25 3.For hearing of main case 04-12-2025 Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar, Advocate for the applicant. **** Counsel for applicant, under instructions, does not press instant Crl. Misc. Application, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE Ahmad
